# HMG Academy CBT Pro

HMG Academy CBT Pro is a free, installable browser-based computer-based testing platform by HMG Concepts / HMG Academy for schools, teachers, tutors, training centres, and students.

Official CBT platform: https://hmgacademyhub.github.io/cbtplatform/
HMG Academy: https://hmgacademy.pages.dev/
HMG Concepts: https://hmgconcepts.pages.dev/
Contact: hismarvellousgrace@gmail.com, +234 810 086 6322, +234 907 790 7677
Founder: Adewale Samson Adeagbo

Key features:
- Teacher dashboard for creating exams
- Student exam portal with access codes and links
- Admin panel for platform management
- 17 question types
- Anti-cheat controls
- Result analytics and CSV export
- Verifiable certificates
- PWA install support for mobile and desktop
- No paid AI API required

Useful pages:
- /index.html — landing page and HMG ecosystem links
- /teacher.html — teacher dashboard
- /student.html — student exam portal
- /admin.html — admin panel
- /certificate.html — certificate verification
- /feature_guide.html — detailed platform guide
- /deployment_validator.html — deployment checks
